user.title: Create a Normified sensor
user.description: Create a calibrated sensor from another sensor's state or attribute.

data_description.attribute: Leave blank to use the source entity state.
data_description.data_points_text: Enter one input, output pair per line.
data_description.hide_source: Cannot be used when reading a source attribute.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Normified sensor
reconfigure.description: Update the source, calibration, metadata, or precision.

data_description.attribute: Leave blank to use the source entity state.
data_description.data_points_text: Enter one input, output pair per line.
data_description.hide_source: Cannot be used when reading a source attribute.

error.invalid_calibration: The calibration configuration is invalid. Check the point format, polynomial degree, and distinct input values.

abort.already_configured: This Normify helper is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The Normify helper was reconfigured successfully.
